Description.value:
[FFB400]IZY Classic[-] is the official version of the IZY-All in One Gun Pack v5.1.3 modpack. Easier to install, to update and to maintain, it brings the classic weapon line-up to 7 Days To Die v3.0.
IMPORTANT: IZY Classic requires 1. [FFB400]IZY Classic Core[-], 2. [FFB400]IZY Classic Resources[-] and 3. [FFB400]Flatlander's Combat Sandbox[-] to function.
The IZY Classic project is maintained by Flat Lander and friends.
